today_news.title: GPT-5.6 is deleting user files when given full access, and OpenAI says it shouldn't but did
today_news.summary: OpenAI's GPT-5.6 has accidentally wiped users' entire home directories in several cases, mostly in the unprotected "Full Access Mode." today_news.title: Linus Torvalds tells AI critics in the Linux kernel community to fork off
today_news.summary: Linux creator Linus Torvalds has come out strongly in favor of AI tools in kernel development. today_news.title: The agent security gap: 54% of enterprises have already had an AI agent incident, and most still let agents share credentials
today_news.summary: Across 107 enterprises, AI agents are being given real access to systems and data while the controls meant to contain them lag behind.
